name: syslog-mcp
description: Query local syslog-mcp SQLite logs through a bundled stdio MCP server.
long_description: Syslog MCP packages the existing syslog mcp stdio entrypoint as a local MCP Bundle. It is query-only: it reads the configured SQLite database and does not start syslog listeners, HTTP servers, Docker Compose, REST, or deploy flows.

tools.name: syslog
tools.description: Search, tail, summarize, and inspect logs from the configured local syslog-mcp SQLite database.

data_dir.title: Data directory
data_dir.description: Directory containing syslog.db plus WAL/SHM sidecars. The bundled stdio server reads this database as SYSLOG_MCP_DB_PATH=<data_dir>/syslog.db.
